symptom_vector: node memory exhaustion, memory saturation, high memory usage, memory leak, memory stress

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: aiops-k8s-05 节点因 node_memory_usage_rate 指标异常导致内存压力故障
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到 aiops-k8s-05 节点的 node_memory_usage_rate 指标在故障期间出现异常变化，p99值从53.06%下降到29.72%，变化率为0.56
Step 2: 分析 aiops-k8s-05 节点上运行的 cartservice-2、paymentservice-1、productcatalogservice-1 等服务可能受到内存压力的影响
Step 3: 确认 node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes 指标也显示内存可用性模式发生变化，进一步支持内存压力假设

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Increased disk read activity indicating potential memory swapping
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 aiops-k8s-05 节点的 node_disk_read_bytes_total 指标是否在故障期间异常增加，这可能表明内存压力导致交换活动

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Increased disk read time indicating I/O contention
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 aiops-k8s-05 节点的 node_disk_read_time_seconds_total 指标是否异常，这可能反映内存压力导致的磁盘I/O增加

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Decreased available memory or abnormal fluctuation
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 aiops-k8s-05 节点的 node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes 指标是否显示可用内存减少或异常波动

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Abnormal memory usage pattern or sudden changes
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 aiops-k8s-05 节点的 node_memory_usage_rate 指标是否出现异常模式或突然变化，特别是p99值的显著波动
